name: Forest Chime
description: Wooden wind chime struck by a gentle forest breeze

prompts.label: wooden wind chime ringing in a quiet forest clearing
prompts.text: wooden wind chime ringing in a quiet forest clearing, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: bamboo tubes clinking softly in warm breeze
prompts.text: bamboo tubes clinking softly in warm breeze, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: birdsong punctuating a peaceful woodland bell
prompts.text: birdsong punctuating a peaceful woodland bell, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: leaf rustle settling after gentle chime strike
prompts.text: leaf rustle settling after gentle chime strike, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: mossy stone garden bell with natural reverb
prompts.text: mossy stone garden bell with natural reverb, meadow with distant thunder, ceramic wind chime in breeze, waterfall mist on skin, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, smooth fade out
